initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', yearmonth.Date) AS month
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME'
  AND yearmonth.Date LIKE '2013%'
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY SUM(yearmonth.Consumption) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 7) AS month
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME'
  AND yearmonth.Date LIKE '2013%'
GROUP BY substr(yearmonth.Date, 1, 7)
ORDER BY SUM(yearmonth.Consumption) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', yearmonth.Date) AS month
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME'
  AND yearmonth.Date LIKE '2013%'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', yearmonth.Date)
ORDER BY SUM(yearmonth.Consumption) DESC
LIMIT 1;
